creator: sixday@sixday.hu
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zuehlsdorff from comment #2)

Hi Torsten,

Thank you very much for the quick response.
Unfortunately I don't have a test system, and my production system is using packages only, so I'm unable to help you with the patch testing :(
I just installed ports to check the git downgrade method tonight, I'll reply about the results.
